basics.name: Anss Khaled Farouk
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software Engineer with expertise in building robust and scalable front-end and back-end systems. My focus is on developing web applications that are not only visually appealing but also highly functional and optimized for performance.

Built robust and scalable solutions using Ruby on Rails, ReactJS, and PostgreSQL

work.name: Yodawy

work.name: Freelance

Built responsive single-page applications across various technologies

work.name: BBI Consultancy

work.summary: Contributed to main projects in an Agile Scrum environment using Angular 2+ and Ionic4 technologies.

projects.name: Chatbot for Information Retrieval System
projects.description: Engineered an innovative information retrieval system capable of extracting crucial information from unstructured and raw data in document formats such as PDFs. Designed to assist users in answering domain-specific queries within closed domain areas.
highlights: Fine-tuned BERT NLP model using the SQuAD dataset for analyzing, extracting, and ranking answers
Used RASA chatbot framework as the backend for natural language understanding and seamless interactions
Graduation project in collaboration with Mentor Graphics

certificates.name: Embedded Systems Diploma, AVR Architecture
certificates.summary: Completed an Embedded Systems Diploma focusing on AVR Architecture, acquiring hands-on experience in developing efficient drivers for Atmega32 internal modules. Gained proficiency in working with AVR architecture and embedded systems development. 120 hours total.
